summary: The implementation covers most core requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-8) with a 3D voxel game environment, player controls, authentication, and vibrant visual theme. However, critical missing features include: no block breaking/placement mechanics implementation, no resource gathering system that adds blocks to inventory when broken, no functional crafting system with pattern matching, and incomplete backend persistence for world state changes. The visual theme follows requirements well with bright colors and rounded aesthetics.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create block placement and breaking mechanics where players can left-click to break blocks and right-click to place blocks from inventory, with visual feedback and block selection highlighting
missing_requirements.reason: No implementation of click handlers for breaking/placing blocks found in PlayerController.tsx or GameCanvas.tsx. No raycasting or block interaction logic is present. The acceptance criteria for left-click breaking, right-click placement, block highlighting, and visual feedback are not implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement resource gathering system where breaking blocks adds them to player inventory
missing_requirements.reason: While inventory display exists, there is no mechanism to add blocks to inventory when breaking them. The backend has addItem function, but no frontend integration with block breaking events. Backend inventory persistence is present but not connected to block destruction.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create basic crafting system with crafting interface where players can combine resources to create new items or block types using recipe patterns
missing_requirements.reason: CraftingMenu UI exists with recipes displayed, but the handleCraft function only logs to console with TODO comment. No backend integration for validating recipes or updating inventory. Pattern matching logic for crafting grid is not implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store player world state in backend including island block composition, player position, inventory contents, and support multiple player islands
missing_requirements.reason: Backend has data structures for world and inventory, but no mutation functions to persist block placement/removal changes. Player position saving is not implemented. No backend endpoints for updateWorld, placeBlock, or removeBlock are present.

hallucinated_features.description: Health display showing '100' with heart icon in GameHUD
hallucinated_features.reason: Health system was not requested in requirements. No health mechanics, damage system, or related gameplay features were specified in BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Extensive block type system including LEAVES, GLASS, COAL, COBBLESTONE, SAND, CLAY, BRICK, SLAB, STAIR, FENCE, BEDROCK
hallucinated_features.reason: Requirements specified minimum of dirt, stone, and wood block types. The implementation includes 17 block types, many of which (glass, coal, slabs, stairs, fences) were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Tool enumeration with Sword, Axe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Bow, FishingRod, Shears types
hallucinated_features.reason: Tool system was not requested in requirements. No mention of tools, weapons, or fishing mechanics in BuildRequest.
